shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' package.json"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- next config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,160p' next.config.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' app/actions.ts && printf '\\n--- page ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- typecheck ---\\n' && npx tsc --noEmit"

/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- app/actions.ts app/page.tsx tsconfig.json package.json && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short 2>/dev/null || true && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && sed -n '1,180p' app/actions.ts && sed -n '1,180p' app/page.tsx && sed -n '1,180p' tsconfig.json"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
